blended.narrative: Red Lodge Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 2,764 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

Saturday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 6.8" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 28".
